prompt: Check if my API folder at samples/ has a valid OpenAPI Puer structure. Fix anything that's missing and add a staging environment with base URL https://staging.example.com.

assertions.text: A validation report file exists that lists the status of all 9 required items
The report correctly identifies .openapi-puer/ and .openapi-puer/environments.json as missing
The report correctly confirms components/, components/parameters/, components/responses/, components/requestBodies/, components/schemas/, paths/, api.json as present
environments.json contains a staging environment with baseUrl 'https://staging.example.com'
Environment IDs follow the env_<name> pattern
Environment entries include createdAt and updatedAt timestamps in ISO 8601 format
All created JSON files are valid parseable JSON
